title: Feedback Forms
excerpt: How to create a feedback form and have the filled out form saved as a file in a column rather than creating a new item in the board.

posts.author: Rohit_K (Rohit Krishnasamy)
posts.cookedHtml: How to create a feedback form and have the filled out form saved as a file in a column rather than creating a new item in the board.

posts.author: eanderson (EthanLaunchPoint)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Rohit,

I’m not 100% sure what you are looking for is possible with Monday.com out of the box. An integration could be built utilizing Zapier, that takes that form response, creates a file, and updates the record in Monday with the newly created file.
